query: SELECT id, name, packageSize, packageQuantity, packagePrice, unitType FROM ingredients WHERE packageSize > 1000 ORDER BY packageSize DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AQnpkq2FC6cpfGo.root --database UyJAnBG4RdjFPnrCDJUrf4 --execute SELECT id, name, packageSize, packageQuantity, packagePrice, unitType FROM ingredients WHERE packageSize > 1000 ORDER BY packageSize DESC LIMIT 20;
